title: habenaria ciliaris var. alba
intro: Habenaria ciliaris var. alba, also known as the white beard orchid, is a type of orchid native to tropical Asia and Australia. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Habenaria ciliaris var. alba include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are often used to make decoctions, teas, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
